{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231716217F8A2CA1590D8CDF87F9"}"},"total":525},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7610208601596576537","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本小说还不错。内容严谨。不过，就是作者的这个写作手法我不是很喜欢。感觉总有一种割裂感。不过总体来说还是非常不错的。
以上观点只代表我个人。不喜勿喷。
虽然已经过完年了，但是我在这里还是祝大家新年快乐！新的一年顺顺利利，快快乐乐！大吉大利！财源滚滚！顺风又顺水！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771895213,"group_id":"7551963318747941913","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"世间本没有路，走的人多了便有了路","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwZUlNhQqMSOZ5IJgAyYOgo0y7YIzB2VQtAnqwWKbFti","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/cea15e819cc24ab19259ef5314ddc83f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788274&x-signature=OQ47O%2FVOoohDLa2fRhdaVja%2FPyg%3D","user_id":"3406700036500904","user_name":"欢沂"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3406700036500904","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7551963318747941913","book_info":{"abstract":"叶云穿越西游世界，成为黄风岭虎先锋。
就是那个没有背景，没有实力，被猪八戒一耙子打死的悲催家伙。
所幸，叶云获得了天道酬勤系统，只要苦修就能变强。
另有机缘造化，开局获得太白金星传承。
自此，一代威名赫赫的黄风大王诞生了。
当西游开始之时，黄风怪从灵山来到黄风岭。
看着端坐在那里，神圣加身的叶云，他傻眼了。
“你是黄风大王，那我是谁？！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/449e2191ba089260ed1878134bd048b3","author":"君且随意","author_id":"","book_id":"7551963318747941913","book_name":"黄风岭爆肝千年，佛祖见我亦低头","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":373,"name":"西游衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=373&name=西游衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7551963514282181145","read_count":"70299","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1086273"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.8","serial_count":"529","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,西游衍生,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/8e0346cc9ac22d3bbec8c713d22ae789~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779441381&x-signature=kb3JQT1gUGOgfWWAu28U63%2BWtyE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"440280687328525","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"26"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231716217F8A2CA1590D8CDF87F9"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_du
